skill.name: comprehensive-review-full-review
skill.description: Orchestrates multi-phase AI-powered code reviews using specialized review agents covering quality, architecture, security, performance, testing, documentation, and best practices.
skill.summary: Multi-phase AI code review orchestrator using specialized agents
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: All 11 static findings are false positives. The skill is a legitimate code review orchestration workflow. Detected patterns were: markdown backticks (line 23), compliance framework names (line 112), and generic terminology incorrectly matched to security patterns. No actual security risks identified.

content.value_statement: This skill orchestrates multiple specialized AI agents to perform exhaustive code reviews covering quality, security, performance, testing, and documentation. It replaces manual review processes with structured, repeatable workflows.
actual_capabilities: Orchestrate multi-phase code reviews with specialized AI agents
Perform security vulnerability assessment with OWASP Top 10 analysis
Analyze code quality, complexity, and technical debt metrics
Evaluate test coverage and testing strategy quality
Generate prioritized remediation reports with clear action items
limitations: Does not execute code or perform actual security scans on local files
Requires Claude Code or Codex to use Task tool for agent orchestration
Cannot access external scanning tools (SonarQube, Snyk) without proper configuration
Framework-specific reviews limited to supported frameworks (React, Spring, Django, etc.)

use_cases.title: Pre-release comprehensive code audit
use_cases.description: Run full code review before production deployment to identify security vulnerabilities, performance issues, and quality gaps.

use_cases.title: Security-focused review for compliance
use_cases.description: Generate detailed security assessment for compliance audits (GDPR, PCI DSS, SOC2).

use_cases.title: Technical debt assessment
use_cases.description: Identify code quality issues, architectural anti-patterns, and refactoring opportunities across codebase.

prompt_templates.title: Basic code review request
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the comprehensive-review-full-review skill to review my codebase at $ARGUMENTS. Apply standard security and quality checks.
prompt_templates.scenario: Quick review of a specific directory or module

prompt_templates.title: Security-focused review
prompt_templates.prompt: Use comprehensive-review-full-review with --security-focus flag to audit $ARGUMENTS for OWASP vulnerabilities and compliance issues.
prompt_templates.scenario: Prioritize security vulnerabilities in the review

prompt_templates.title: Framework-specific review
prompt_templates.prompt: Use comprehensive-review-full-review with --framework React and --metrics-report flags to review $ARGUMENTS.
prompt_templates.scenario: Apply React-specific best practices with detailed metrics

prompt_templates.title: Strict mode pre-deployment review
prompt_templates.prompt: Use comprehensive-review-full-review with --strict-mode --security-focus --tdd-review flags to perform strict review of $ARGUMENTS.

output_examples.output: Comprehensive review report with 4 phases: (1) Quality metrics showing cyclomatic complexity of 15 functions, 3 code smells identified; (2) Security finding: 2 XSS vulnerabilities in user input handling; (3) Performance: N+1 query detected in user listing; (4) Test coverage at 72% with gaps in error handling tests. Priority matrix included.

output_examples.input: Run strict security review on the login module
output_examples.output: Security audit complete: Critical - SQL injection risk in login query (CVSS 9.1); High - Session token using weak hashing (MD5); Medium - Missing rate limiting on authentication endpoints. Remediation steps provided for each finding.

best_practices: Use configuration flags to focus review on specific concerns (security-focus, performance-critical, tdd-review)
Integrate results into CI/CD pipeline for automated pre-deployment gates
Review consolidated report and address P0 critical issues before lower priorities
anti_patterns: Running full review without flags on large codebases - takes excessive time
Ignoring P0 critical issues identified in the consolidated report
Using strict-mode without understanding the failure criteria

faq.question: What tools does this skill use for scanning?
faq.answer: The skill orchestrates AI agents that can integrate with SonarQube, CodeQL, Semgrep, Snyk, Trivy, and GitLeaks. Actual scanning requires these tools to be configured in your environment.

faq.question: Can this skill modify my code?
faq.answer: No. This skill only performs analysis and generates reports. It does not write or modify any code files.

faq.question: What is strict-mode?
faq.answer: When enabled with --strict-mode flag, the review will fail if any critical (P0) issues are found. Useful as a pre-deployment gate.

faq.question: Which frameworks are supported?
faq.answer: Supported frameworks include React, Spring, Django, and general language patterns for JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Java, and Go.

faq.question: Does this skill access external networks?
faq.answer: The skill itself does not make network requests. It orchestrates AI agents. External tool integrations (Snyk, Trivy) may make network calls if configured.

faq.question: How long does a comprehensive review take?
faq.answer: Duration varies based on codebase size and complexity. A typical review of 1000-5000 lines takes 2-5 minutes with parallel agent execution.
